title: Salty Flaky Slovakian Semolina Dumplings
description: Light, fluffy semolina dumplings seasoned with aromatic herbs, perfect for a comforting sickday meal. Theyre poached to keep them tender and easy to digest.

ingredients.name: dried parsley
ingredients.notes: Fresh dried gives a bright note

instructions: 1. In a mixing bowl combine semolina flour, salt, dried parsley, dill, and black pepper.
2. Add warm water gradually, stirring until a soft, non‑sticky dough forms.
3. Knead the dough gently for 2–3 minutes, then cover and rest for 10 minutes to allow the semolina to hydrate.
4. While the dough rests, bring a large pot of salted water to a gentle boil (≈100 °C).
5. Lightly oil a clean surface and divide the dough into 12 equal portions; roll each into a slender cylinder, then cut into 1–2 cm pieces.
